---
title: "01 - Exploratory Data Analysis & Stationarity Tests"
subtitle: "ECON 612 Time Series Project: EUR/CNY & China-EU Trade"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "tseries", "urca", "forecast", "ggplot2", "gridExtra")
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) install.packages(pkg)
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}

df <- read_csv("../data/clean/monthly_panel.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# 1. 描述性统计

```{r descriptive}
vars_of_interest <- c("fx_mean", "fx_sd", "trade", "log_fx", "log_trade")

desc_stats <- df %>%
  select(all_of(vars_of_interest)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = sum(!is.na(value)),
    mean   = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min    = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25    = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75    = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    max    = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(desc_stats)
```

# 2. 时间趋势可视化

## 2.1 EUR/CNY 汇率

```{r plot-fx, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = fx_mean)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "EUR/CNY Monthly Mean Exchange Rate",
       x = NULL, y = "EUR/CNY") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = log_fx)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Log EUR/CNY",
       x = NULL, y = "log(EUR/CNY)") +
  theme_minimal()

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
```

## 2.2 贸易额

```{r plot-trade, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
p3 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = trade / 1e9)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred") +
  labs(title = "China-EU Monthly Exports",
       x = NULL, y = "Billion EUR") +
  theme_minimal()

p4 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = log_trade)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred") +
  labs(title = "Log China-EU Exports",
       x = NULL, y = "log(Trade)") +
  theme_minimal()

grid.arrange(p3, p4, ncol = 2)
```

## 2.3 汇率月度波动

```{r plot-vol, fig.width=10, fig.height=3}
ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = fx_sd)) +
  geom_line(color = "orange") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "grey40", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "EUR/CNY Monthly Realized Volatility (Std Dev)",
       x = NULL, y = "Std Dev") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# 3. 平稳性检验 (Unit Root Tests)

## 3.1 ADF 检验

```{r adf-function}
run_adf <- function(x, varname) {
  test <- adf.test(na.omit(x))
  cat("===", varname, "===\n")
  cat("  ADF statistic:", round(test$statistic, 4), "\n")
  cat("  p-value:      ", round(test$p.value, 4), "\n")
  cat("  结论:         ", ifelse(test$p.value < 0.05,
        "平稳 (拒绝H0)", "非平稳 (无法拒绝H0)"), "\n\n")
  return(test)
}
```

### 原始序列（Level）

```{r adf-level}
adf_fx    <- run_adf(df$log_fx,    "log(EUR/CNY)")
adf_trade <- run_adf(df$log_trade, "log(Trade)")
```

### 一阶差分

```{r adf-diff}
adf_dfx    <- run_adf(diff(df$log_fx),    "Δlog(EUR/CNY)")
adf_dtrade <- run_adf(diff(df$log_trade), "Δlog(Trade)")
```

## 3.2 KPSS 检验（作为 ADF 的补充）

```{r kpss}
cat("=== KPSS: log(EUR/CNY) ===\n")
print(kpss.test(na.omit(df$log_fx)))

cat("\n=== KPSS: log(Trade) ===\n")
print(kpss.test(na.omit(df$log_trade)))

cat("\n=== KPSS: Δlog(EUR/CNY) ===\n")
print(kpss.test(na.omit(diff(df$log_fx))))

cat("\n=== KPSS: Δlog(Trade) ===\n")
print(kpss.test(na.omit(diff(df$log_trade))))
```

## 3.3 单位根检验汇总表

```{r summary-table}
unit_root_summary <- tibble(
  Variable   = c("log(EUR/CNY)", "log(Trade)", "Δlog(EUR/CNY)", "Δlog(Trade)"),
  ADF_stat   = round(c(adf_fx$statistic, adf_trade$statistic,
                        adf_dfx$statistic, adf_dtrade$statistic), 4),
  ADF_pvalue = round(c(adf_fx$p.value, adf_trade$p.value,
                        adf_dfx$p.value, adf_dtrade$p.value), 4),
  Integration = ifelse(c(adf_fx$p.value, adf_trade$p.value,
                          adf_dfx$p.value, adf_dtrade$p.value) < 0.05,
                        "I(0)", "I(1)+")
)

print(unit_root_summary)
```

# 4. ACF / PACF

```{r acf-fx, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
Acf(df$log_fx, main = "ACF: log(EUR/CNY)")
Pacf(df$log_fx, main = "PACF: log(EUR/CNY)")
Acf(diff(df$log_fx), main = "ACF: Δlog(EUR/CNY)")
Pacf(diff(df$log_fx), main = "PACF: Δlog(EUR/CNY)")
```

```{r acf-trade, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
Acf(df$log_trade, main = "ACF: log(Trade)")
Pacf(df$log_trade, main = "PACF: log(Trade)")
Acf(diff(df$log_trade), main = "ACF: Δlog(Trade)")
Pacf(diff(df$log_trade), main = "PACF: Δlog(Trade)")
```

# 5. 小结

> **在这里记录你的发现：**
>
> - log(EUR/CNY) 是否 I(1)?
> - log(Trade) 是否 I(1)?
> - 差分后是否平稳?
> - ACF/PACF 图显示了什么模式?
